title: Spirit's Hardmode
description: "The ancient spirits of light and dark have been released."
body:
In Minecraft, Spirit's Hardmode is a mod that makes the game more rewarding and challenging. To turn the world into hardmode, you must first kill the enderdragon. This is similar to the game Terraria, where defeating the ender dragon is required to enter Hardmode.

Once Hardmode is activated, players will find that mobs are more difficult to kill and that New ores have generated. However, the rewards for successful mining and combat are increased, making Hardmode a challenge that is well worth undertaking.

 

It is planned to have new ores, enemies and loot to spawn when entering hardmode, though currently it only increases mob difficulty.

 

You may use this in a modpack!
